today.subtitle: Lift cancelled by Kevin (work overload — 4 property tours, on feet most of the day). Not a recovery call. NEAT was high (~6,500 steps, 674 active kcal) but that's incidental movement, not strength stimulus.

today.why: Kevin requested cancellation on 2026-06-09 due to a heavy work day. No make-up scheduled per adjustment-rules.md (recovery beats volume; strength is protected by guarding Thu Split B as the week's lift).
